title: 2021 Annual Meeting Cash Prizes
summary: NANA Regional Corporation, Inc. (NANA) held its 2021 Annual Meeting on Saturday, March 27, 2021, virtually via nanatkut.com. Cash prizes were drawn for those shareholders who submitted valid Proxies early, online and by the March 24 deadline as well as shareholders who registered in person in Kivalina. Winners in Kivalina have already received their cash prizes and remaining w...

title: NANA Shareholders Elect 2021 Board of Directors
summary: During NANA’s Annual Meeting of Shareholders, held today virtually via nanatkut.com, NANA shareholders voted to elect eight directors to the NANA board. Newly elected directors Ely Utuktauruq Cyrus, William “Billy” Utauyuk Sheldon Jr. and Tommy Panitchaq Ballot Sr. and incumbents Charlie Alasuk Curt...

title: Ahtna Announces Shareholder and Elder Dividend Distribution for 2021
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – To assist shareholders who are experiencing economic hardships as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Board of Directors and the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt’aene (People’s) Trust have declared an early partial 2021 shareholder distribution of $13.00 per share.
